title: ProfitsLocal admin · system alerts wired
detail:
This is a test message from `core/ops/alert-pusher.js` confirming the webhook is connected.
Future alerts (gosom Docker died, PSI quota low, disk < 5GB, entity store corruption, ...) will arrive here.
